title: Silky Bhuna Haddock Stir-fry
description: A silky and fermented haddock stir-fry that is nut-free-friendly and can be a hangover cure.

ingredients.name: A handful of fresh cilantro, chopped

instructions: Preheat your wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Season the haddock fillet with salt and pepper on both sides.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce and lemon juice until well combined.

Add sesame oil to the heated pan and swirl it around, ensuring every part of the pan is coated evenly with the oil. Place the haddock in the pan skin side down first, then flip once golden brown on both sides.
Pour the soy-lemon mixture over the fish while it's still cooking for a few seconds.
Remove from heat and garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
